/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/application/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/utils/gl.c.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/logger/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/states/MenuState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/states/PlayState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/states/PauseState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/states/StateManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/render/OpenGLAdapter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/ecs/World.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/ecs/systems/RenderSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyGameEngine.dir/src/ecs/systems/AnimationSystem.cpp.o -o MyGameEngine   -L/Users/pavel/Desktop/WorkingProject/CplusWorks/AID/Practice1/dependencies/library  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/pavel/Desktop/WorkingProject/CplusWorks/AID/Practice1/dependencies/library -lglfw.3.4 -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit
